title: StatLeanAgent Progressive Build Blueprint
target: Build a verifier-first, human-guided AI system that progressively grows a Lean statistical inference library, benchmarks proof capability, and prepares auditable SFT/DPO/GRPO training data.
loop_contract: Run the smoke/eval path when the tree is clean or after local changes.
Inspect this blueprint and select the first non-done phase and milestone.
If health is green, implement or evaluate the next unblocked milestone instead of only monitoring.
Promote changes only after Python tests, deterministic benchmark regeneration, Lean build or CI, and no forbidden Lean shortcuts.
Update this blueprint when a milestone changes status.
promotion_gates: No accepted sorry/admit/unsafe/unreviewed axiom in StatInference.
Premise index and training manifest can be regenerated.
Strict GitHub CI Lean lake build passes.
Statistical meaning of new definitions is human-reviewable and non-vacuity is tracked.

phases.name: Green Verifier Baseline
phases.objective: Create the repository, strict CI, smoke path, seed Lean modules, benchmark registry, premise indexing, and training manifest scaffold.
evidence: commit 4d5474a
CI run 25199578921 success
45 Python tests
27 seed benchmark tasks
199 indexed local Lean premises

milestones.name: Premise indexing and training manifest scaffold

phases.name: Statistics Core Theorem Layer
phases.objective: Move from bridge interfaces toward reusable concrete theorem families for asymptotic statistics and statistical learning.

milestones.name: Convergence bridge interfaces for Slutsky, delta method, CLT route
M-estimator and Z-estimator deterministic oracle interfaces
Mathlib-backed convergence wrappers for convergence in probability/distribution
evidence: StatInference.Asymptotics.Convergence defines MathlibConvergesInProbability and MathlibConvergesInDistribution on top of mathlib TendstoInMeasure/TendstoInDistribution.
StatInference.mathlib_convergesInDistribution_of_probability wraps mathlib's convergence-in-probability implies convergence-in-distribution theorem.
benchmark mathlib_probability_to_distribution_seed accepted locally

milestones.name: Finite-class uniform convergence theorem and ERM consistency corollary
evidence: StatInference.EmpiricalProcess.Basic defines oracle_ineq_of_uniform_deviation_on and oracle_excess_sequence_bound_on for restricted classes.
StatInference.FiniteClassUniformConvergence packages finite-class uniform deviation plus a vanishing radius.
FiniteClassUniformConvergence.eventually_excessRisk_lt_of_approx_erm proves eventual excess-risk consistency for approximate ERM.
benchmarks finite_class_oracle_excess_on_seed and finite_class_erm_consistency_seed accepted locally

milestones.name: Concrete ratio/Hajek/IPW estimator algebra skeleton
evidence: StatInference.Estimator.Ratio defines ratioEstimate, ratioResidual, RatioEstimatorSequence, hajekRatio, and hajekResidual.
StatInference.ratio_sub_target_eq_residual_div proves the deterministic ratio linearization identity.
StatInference.scaled_hajekRatio_sub_target_eq_residual_div proves the scaled Hajek/IPW residual identity for asymptotic-rate handoff.
benchmarks ratio_error_identity_seed and scaled_hajek_ratio_error_seed accepted locally

next_actions: P1 is complete; continue to empirical process notation and GC modules in P2.

phases.name: Empirical Process And GC Library
phases.objective: Build empirical measures, finite-class GC, covering-number interfaces, and the first reusable Glivenko-Cantelli theorem family.

milestones.name: Empirical average and empirical risk notation
evidence: StatInference.EmpiricalProcess.Average defines empiricalAverage, empiricalRiskOfLoss, indexedEmpiricalRiskOfLoss, and empiricalRiskSequenceOfSamples.
StatInference.empiricalRiskSequence_excess_bound_of_uniform_deviation connects loss-based empirical risk notation to the deterministic ERM excess-risk theorem.
benchmarks empirical_average_unfold_seed and empirical_risk_sequence_oracle_seed accepted locally

milestones.name: Finite union/finite class uniform deviation bound interface
evidence: StatInference.EmpiricalProcess.Finite defines DeviationFailureEventOn as the finite-union failure event for restricted-class deviations.
StatInference.empiricalDeviationBoundOn_of_not_deviationFailureEventOn converts no-failure evidence into EmpiricalDeviationBoundOn.
StatInference.FiniteUnionDeviationSequence packages finite-class no-failure certificates and converts them into EmpiricalDeviationSequenceOn.
StatInference.FiniteUnionDeviationSequence.excessRiskBound feeds the finite-union certificate into the approximate-ERM excess-risk theorem.
benchmarks finite_union_no_failure_seed and finite_union_sequence_excess_seed accepted locally

milestones.name: GC class preservation for subclasses/projections
evidence: StatInference.EmpiricalProcess.Preservation defines FiniteClassMarker.project for finite subclasses.
DeviationFailureEventOn.mono and not_of_not_larger preserve finite-union failure/no-failure evidence under subclass projection.
FiniteUnionDeviationCertificate.project and FiniteUnionDeviationSequence.project reuse finite-union certificates on subclasses.
FiniteClassUniformConvergence.project and projectToGlivenkoCantelliClass preserve finite-class GC certificates under subclass projection.
benchmarks finite_class_gc_projection_seed and finite_union_projection_seed accepted locally

milestones.name: Covering-number and Rademacher-compatible benchmark tasks
evidence: StatInference.EmpiricalProcess.Complexity defines CoveringNumberSpec and CoveringNumberDeviationCertificate as proof-carrying entropy-route interfaces.
StatInference.EmpiricalProcess.Complexity defines RademacherComplexitySpec and RademacherDeviationCertificate with radius = 2 * complexity + slack.
RademacherDeviationCertificate.radius_tendsto_zero proves the deterministic vanishing-radius handoff from vanishing complexity and slack.
benchmarks covering_certificate_gc_seed and rademacher_certificate_gc_seed accepted locally

next_actions: P2 is complete; continue to the asymptotic estimator library in P3.

phases.name: Asymptotic Estimator Library
phases.objective: Connect asymptotic linearity, CLT, Slutsky, M/Z-estimation, and influence expansion into reusable estimator proof paths.

milestones.name: Asymptotic linearity plus CLT theorem with explicit assumptions
evidence: StatInference.Estimator.Normality defines IndexedAsymptoticLinearCLTRoute with explicit estimator expansion, CLT, negligible remainder, and normality bridge fields.
IndexedAsymptoticLinearCLTRoute.asymptoticLinear extracts asymptotic linearity from expansion matching, expansion proof, and negligible remainder.
IndexedAsymptoticLinearCLTRoute.asymptoticNormal proves expansion + negligible remainder + CLT imply the route's asymptotic-normality statement.
benchmarks indexed_asymptotic_linear_clt_route_seed and indexed_asymptotic_linear_clt_bridge_seed accepted locally

milestones.name: Z-estimator differentiability/linearization bridge
evidence: StatInference.Estimator.ZLinearization defines ZEstimatorLinearizationBridge with explicit differentiability, estimating-equation, moment-linearization, expansion, and negligible-remainder assumptions.
ZEstimatorLinearizationBridge.toIndexedAsymptoticLinearEstimator projects the Z-estimator route into the generic indexed asymptotic-linear estimator interface.
ZEstimatorAsymptoticNormalRoute.asymptoticNormal composes the Z-linearization bridge with the P3.M1 CLT normality route.
benchmarks z_estimator_linearization_bridge_seed and z_estimator_asymptotic_normal_route_seed accepted locally

milestones.name: M-estimator argmin consistency bridge
evidence: StatInference.Estimator.MConsistency defines MEstimatorArgminConsistencyRoute with explicit sample path, uniform-deviation convergence, and approximate-argmin tolerance convergence assumptions.
MEstimatorArgminConsistencyRoute.excessRiskBound projects the deterministic M-estimator oracle inequality along the stored sample path.
MEstimatorArgminConsistencyRoute.eventually_excessRisk_lt proves eventual excess-risk consistency from vanishing deviation radius and tolerance.
benchmarks m_estimator_argmin_consistency_bound_seed and m_estimator_argmin_consistency_eventual_seed accepted locally

milestones.name: Delta-method theorem family for estimator transformations
evidence: StatInference.Estimator.DeltaMethod defines ParameterTransformation and DeltaMethodEstimatorRoute for transformed estimators.
DeltaMethodEstimatorRoute.toDeltaMethodBridge exposes estimator transformations as the generic delta-method bridge.
DeltaMethodEstimatorRoute.transformedConvergence proves transformed-estimator convergence from the transform relation, linear-part convergence, and negligible remainder.
benchmarks delta_method_estimator_bridge_seed and delta_method_estimator_convergence_seed accepted locally

next_actions: P3 is complete; continue to causal and semiparametric inference in P4.

phases.name: Causal And Semiparametric Inference
phases.objective: Build potential outcomes, IPW/AIPW/TMLE-style bridges, influence functions, and Neyman orthogonality with explicit assumptions.

milestones.name: ATE identification sanity and non-vacuity examples
evidence: StatInference.Causal.ATE defines DeterministicATECase as a concrete one-unit real-valued potential-outcome model.
DeterministicATECase.observedATE_identified proves the observed ATE bridge conclusion from verified consistency, overlap, and unconfoundedness certificates.
ATEIdentificationSanityExample.ofOutcomes constructs a non-vacuous inhabited ATE identification witness from two real outcomes.
benchmarks ate_identification_sanity_witness_seed and ate_identification_sanity_verified_seed accepted locally

milestones.name: AIPW orthogonality interface and product-rate bridge

next_actions: Build IPW/Hajek ratio estimator linearization on top of the ratio algebra and causal identification layer.

phases.name: Proof Agent And Benchmark Loop
phases.objective: Turn the library into a measurable proof-agent loop with theorem-hole tasks, repair tasks, premise-use metrics, and failure taxonomy.

milestones.name: Verifier artifacts for all benchmark tasks

next_actions: Each new theorem family must add at least one non-projection benchmark.

phases.name: Domain Adaptation Training Pipeline
phases.objective: Prepare auditable SFT, DPO, and GRPO data generation from verified traces and Lean-labeled attempts.

milestones.name: SFT examples from verified proof traces
DPO pairs from accepted/rejected Lean attempts
Baseline prover comparison on held-out StatInferBench

next_actions: Do not launch RL until P5 has nontrivial benchmark tasks and verifier artifacts.

phases.name: Progressive Library Growth
phases.objective: Add a curator-gated mechanism for lemma mining, duplicate detection, non-vacuity examples, and downstream-use tracking.
next_actions: Gate any auto-mined lemma before adding it to StatInference.

phases.name: Paper-Quality System Demonstration
phases.objective: Demonstrate that the system improves statistical theorem formalization over general Lean provers and produces reusable Lean statistics infrastructure.

milestones.name: Ablations for retrieval, SFT, DPO, process reward, and curation
Research paper draft and reproducibility bundle

next_actions: Only start after at least one concrete theorem chain is no-sorry and CI-green.
